query: SELECT msm.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, msm.share_percentage FROM material_supplier_mappings msm JOIN suppliers s ON msm.supplier_id = s.id WHERE msm.material_code = 'A1300003' ORDER BY s.supplier_name;
